summary: An otherworldly Scarlet Begonias makes the second set epic; recording source isn’t specified but the performance shines.
review: The reviewer raves about a transcendent rendition of Scarlet Begonias, calling it one of their top‑five performances and describing the entire second set as epic. No details are given about the audio source or sound quality, so the focus is entirely on the musical impact.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review highlights an exceptional performance; lack of recording details prevents a higher confidence rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on sound quality, clarity, or mix; no indication of issues or strengths.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is described as epic, with Scarlet Begonias setting a high bar for the rest of the performance.
